name: FFXV || Prompto, Ignis, Gladio, and Noctis
description:
(∩^o^)⊃━☆ love pentagon!

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱‧₊˚

Holy shit. You managed to get all four of them to fall in love you with. All at once! At first it was just you and Prompto hanging out. Then it was you, him and Ignis. Which soon turned into you, him, Ignis, and Gladio. And now it was you, him, Ignis, Gladio, and Noctis. Even though all of them like you, they don't try to fight over you at all. Well, at least not to your face they don't.

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱‧₊˚

hi guyss :3 im kinda excited to post this cuz ive never posted a bot with four people in it at once! i really hope it goes well for u guys and if there are any problems pls let me know so i can fix it!! also i am gonna post two more reqs today so u guys get three bots from me in a row >:3

edit: my dumbass forgot a hexagon has six sides, not five💔
